name: GET Response handling
Proxy for data gathering (GET)
info:
This part is the rest api proxy used to receive the get request from HA (Gielz) and forward it to both Zedure devices (must be equal size).

The reply consists of the replies from both devices in an array. In addition, we will add the direct values that the HA defined sensors will use to get the data that they need, derived from both responses.

The values returned to client will be whatever the intergration needs:

"electricLevel" will be the average of both devices
"hyperTmp":3011 will be the highest of both devices
"chargeMaxLimit" will be from both devices added
"chargeMaxLimit" will be from both devices added
...

name: Proxy for instruction posting (POST)
info: This part is the rest api proxy used to receive the POST request from HA (Gielz) and forward it to both Zedure devices.
